name: Kling AI API
what_it_does: Kling AI is a high-quality AI video generation model by Kuaishou Technology offering competitive text-to-video and image-to-video generation via REST API.
use_cases: Generating high-quality AI video clips from text prompts at competitive pricing
Image-to-video animation for creative and commercial projects
Cost-effective AI video generation for price-sensitive applications
International applications seeking an alternative to US-based video AI providers
not_for: Applications requiring mature, well-documented Western-market SDKs
Workloads where regulatory or data-residency concerns around Chinese infrastructure apply
Developers needing extensive English-language support and community resources
Production systems requiring long-term API stability guarantees
best_when: Best when video quality comparable to Runway Gen-3 is needed at a lower price point, and the team can handle a less mature developer experience.
avoid_when: Avoid when data sovereignty, regulatory compliance, or reliance on Chinese infrastructure is a concern for your organization.

auth.notes: API key authentication; keys provisioned through Kling AI developer platform

pricing.paid_tiers: Credit packs at competitive rates; generally lower cost per generation than Runway
pricing.notes: Pricing is competitive and lower than most Western alternatives; credit top-up model

performance.rate_limits: Concurrent job limits apply; specific limits vary by account tier

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Documentation is primarily in Chinese with English translations of varying quality; error messages may be untranslated or ambiguous
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency keys; each request generates a new unique job
known_agent_gotchas: Documentation quality is inconsistent — English translations may lag Chinese originals
No official SDK — agents must implement raw HTTP with manual error parsing
Async generation requires polling; webhook support exists but is less documented
Data processed on Chinese infrastructure — may trigger compliance concerns for some organizations
Content policy tuned to Chinese regulatory requirements, which may differ from Western expectations
API versioning and deprecation practices are less mature than Western competitors

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; API key auth; data processed in China — significant consideration for regulated industries; no scope granularity
